text.message: there's actually a setup here i quite like
odds are u get to 5 2 before oj can settle ore port and i dont think oj ever settles ore port
Absolutely not horrible, u have the ports there
tbh only person here guaranteed the world is red
i dont think theres much i can do that doesnt give them a ton of life
why dont you want me to have life black? :(
I'll trade 1 for wheat now and on your turn 1 for any
we're lacking if we dont help each other
we trading red what he needs?
i knew they didnt have settle and the brick is helpful to me
sheep has already rolled so much
when i have abundance ill trade
i figure road is my only game
why not just loop it the other way around 11?
i literally offered the same trade
id rather give it to blue han you
U went for a bit too much black
And could loop the 11 the other way
not as good considering it splits my roads more
makes my road game more vulnerable
Apparently u had the roads anyway
i stand by my play ur not gonna make me feel bad about it
anyway i can plow red with one wood
jesus i cant get a roll
even another wood roll would be great for me
it doesnt matter, hoping for a lucky 7 is losing
ok sorry maybe was a mistake
u can have ur ore back
i'd have to give up a card just to get it from u it's not worth it
and this is what i meant when i said going for 4 5 11 was my only play
I mean oj wins it before it even is my turn but alright
i got road pieces for u black
either i city or i lose
im not gonna extend the game for u
